content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against origin/master and read the changed implementation/tests in src/shared/domain.rs, src/contexts/agent_execution/policy.rs, and src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs. I did not find any correctness, safety, or robustness issues in this change. cargo test and cargo fmt --check pass. cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings still fails, but only on pre-existing unrelated lints elsewhere in the repository.

## Amendments

None.
